name: JAYAAPPARELGROUP.COM
message: [AI generated] Jaya Apparel Group LLC is a renowned fashion industry leader that designs, produces, and sells women's and children's clothing. The company owns various popular fashion brands, such as Everly, Ten Sixty Sherman, Doe & Rae, Daniel Rainn, and Paper Crane. Offering a range of product lines including dresses, tops, bottoms, and outerwear, the company caters to different fashion tastes. It is committed to delivering fashionable, quality, and value-driven clothing for modern, trend-savvy consumers.
